EmailTemplate.description: Grid Review notification sent to CGL and CGF Top Management queues listing all grids whose review date has been reached.
EmailTemplate.name: Grid Review Email Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Agreement Grid Review
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello,
You have requested a review of agreement grids. Below is the table with the details:
Grid Name | Agreement Name | Company Name | Business Background
Please log in and take any action necessary.
Regards, Salesforce Automation
